caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a gold eagle emblem, and large headphones sits in a recording studio. He wears several gold chains around his neck and a gold bracelet on his right wrist. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. Behind him, a white wall features gold stars and the repeated words "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Across the sequence, the man remains seated, maintaining a serious expression. He slightly shifts his head and upper body, with his right hand resting near his chest, while his gaze remains focused forward. The background, equipment, and on-screen text remain static throughout the duration of the clip.
